metadata.description: Marketing plugin organized into 5 sub-verticals (Paid Acquisition, SEO & Content, Lifecycle & Retention, Positioning & Messaging, Analytics & Experimentation) with 12 specialist agents and a brief-and-judge architecture for ad creative.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: 12-agent marketing plugin organized into 5 sub-verticals. v0.1 ships Paid Acquisition fully built (Google Ads API wiring, Enhanced Conversions for Leads, offline conversion uploads, dual-account suspension protection, hard cost safeguards) and stubs the other 4 sub-verticals. Ad creative uses the same brief-and-judge architecture as brand: creative-ops writes per-channel briefs, the user generates externally, creative-ops judges via multimodal vision. State lives in .marketing/ in the target project. Composes with brand (reads voice.md + tokens.json) and sales (provides leads, consumes closed/lost for attribution).
